objective: Audit and archive legacy root-level Python scripts
background: 14 Python scripts at workspace root (ai_advisor.py, asset_doubling.py, asset_doubling_hunter.py, auto_optimizer.py, doubling_final_report.py). These appear to be legacy research scripts not integrated into the main pipeline.
constraints: Do not delete any Python script without explicit approval in report
Do not modify scripts still referenced by cron or launchd
Do not modify trading thresholds or strategy parameters
Do not require live broker connection
acceptance_tests: Each Python script classified as: active (document usage), archiveable, or delete-candidate
Archiveable scripts moved to archive/ with an INVENTORY.md entry
Delete-candidates listed in report for operator approval
required_outputs: Each Python script classified as: active (document usage), archiveable, or delete-candidate
Archiveable scripts moved to archive/ with an INVENTORY.md entry
Delete-candidates listed in report for operator approval
forbidden_changes: Do not delete any Python script without explicit approval in report
Do not modify scripts still referenced by cron or launchd
handoff_questions: Did you verify each acceptance criterion with evidence?
